events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail** — troweling bleed water back into the surface before it evaporated is a finishing-sequence violation per ACI 302, producing the dusting/scaling seen in the failed-surface photos. Flagged as high risk, `installed-defective`, with immediate corrective actions (stop finishing, hold curing application, evaluate repair scope, retrain crew on proper bleed-water timing) and re-sequencing guidance before curing per ACI 308 can proceed.
